example_cases.description: Card popup appears within 200ms after bubble click event received
example_cases.input: Emit stash://show-card event with context_id and anchor_position
example_cases.expected_output: CardPopupView component mounted and visible within 200ms. Positioned adjacent to anchor_position. Width=320px.
example_cases.setup: Render panels app. Mock get_context_detail to return test data.

example_cases.description: Card popup displays: context name, current intent, status badge, timestamp, jump button
example_cases.input: Show card for context with name='my-project', intent='修复登录bug', status='running', updated_at=1712505600
example_cases.expected_output: Card renders all 5 elements: context name 'my-project', intent text '修复登录bug', purple 'running' badge, formatted timestamp, and a jump action button.
example_cases.setup: Mock get_context_detail returning the specified data.

example_cases.description: Card dismisses within 150ms on click outside
example_cases.input: While card is visible, click outside the card boundary
example_cases.expected_output: Card component unmounts/hides within 150ms. Dismiss animation completes.
example_cases.setup: Show card popup. Simulate mousedown event outside card bounds.

example_cases.description: Card dismisses within 150ms on Escape key press
example_cases.input: While card is visible, press Escape key
example_cases.expected_output: Card component unmounts/hides within 150ms.
example_cases.setup: Show card popup. Simulate keydown Escape event.

example_cases.description: Card popup uses pixel-art visual style (Press Start 2P + IBM Plex Mono fonts)
example_cases.input: Render CardPopupView
example_cases.expected_output: Card heading uses 'Press Start 2P' font-family. Body text uses 'IBM Plex Mono'. Overall style matches pixel-art design DNA.
example_cases.setup: Render CardPopupView with test data. Inspect computed styles.

example_cases.description: Intent graph renders vertical timeline with most recent intents at top
example_cases.input: Open IntentGraphView for a context with 10 intents
example_cases.expected_output: Timeline rendered vertically. First visible intent is the most recent (highest created_at). Time flows downward. Two-column layout per mockup.
example_cases.setup: Mock get_intent_timeline returning 10 intents sorted by created_at DESC.

example_cases.description: Intent graph displays intents at correct compression tiers
example_cases.input: Open IntentGraphView with intents: 3 narrative (recent), 2 summary (older), 1 label (oldest)
example_cases.expected_output: Recent section shows narrative intents with full text. Middle section shows summary intents. Bottom shows label. Visual differentiation between tiers.
example_cases.setup: Mock get_intent_timeline returning mixed-tier intents.

example_cases.description: Clicking a compressed intent node expands to show source intents
example_cases.input: Click on a summary-tier intent node in the graph
example_cases.expected_output: expand_compressed_intent Tauri command called. Source narrative intents rendered inline below the summary node.
example_cases.setup: Mock expand_compressed_intent returning 4 source narratives.

example_cases.description: Direction-change intents display amber '转折' pill tag on timeline
example_cases.input: Render graph with an intent where is_direction_change=true
example_cases.expected_output: Intent node has an amber-colored pill element containing '转折' text.
example_cases.setup: Mock timeline with one direction-change intent among normal ones.

example_cases.description: Intent graph renders within 500ms for 200 visible nodes
example_cases.input: Open IntentGraphView with 200 intent nodes
example_cases.expected_output: Component mount + initial render completes within 500ms. Virtual scrolling active (only visible nodes in DOM).
example_cases.setup: Mock get_intent_timeline returning 200 intents. Measure render time.

example_cases.description: Virtual scrolling activates for >50 intent nodes, keeping DOM node count bounded
example_cases.input: Render IntentGraphView with 100 intents, scroll through the list
example_cases.expected_output: DOM contains at most ~30 rendered intent nodes at any time (viewport + buffer). Scroll position preserved.
example_cases.setup: Mock 100 intents. Render component. Count DOM nodes at rest and during scroll.

example_cases.description: Manual input dialog appears when stash://show-input event received
example_cases.input: Emit stash://show-input Tauri event (triggered by global hotkey)
example_cases.expected_output: ManualInputView component becomes visible with text input field, context selector, and submit button.
example_cases.setup: Render panels app. Listen for show-input event.

example_cases.description: Manual input submit calls submit_manual_intent with entered text and selected context
example_cases.input: Type '开始实现缓存层' in input, select context 'my-project', click submit
example_cases.expected_output: submit_manual_intent Tauri command called with content='开始实现缓存层' and context_id of selected context. Dialog closes after success.
example_cases.setup: Show ManualInputView. Mock get_contexts returning 2 contexts. Mock submit_manual_intent.

example_cases.description: Clicking intent text on card popup enables inline editing
example_cases.input: Click on the intent text area in an open CardPopupView
example_cases.expected_output: Text becomes editable (input or contenteditable). Submit button appears. Original text shown as placeholder/reference.
example_cases.setup: Show card popup with an auto-distilled intent.

example_cases.description: Submitting edited intent calls correct_intent, preserving original
example_cases.input: Edit intent text to '修正：重构缓存层' and click submit
example_cases.expected_output: correct_intent Tauri command called with original intent_id and new_content='修正：重构缓存层'. Card refreshes showing new correction. Original not modified.
example_cases.setup: Show card with editable intent. Mock correct_intent returning success.

example_cases.description: Jump action on 'running' context calls focus_terminal
example_cases.input: Click jump button on card popup showing a 'running' context
example_cases.expected_output: focus_terminal Tauri command called with the context's project_dir. Card closes after action.
example_cases.setup: Show card for a running context with directory='/home/user/my-project'.

example_cases.description: Jump action on 'done' context calls open_pr_url
example_cases.input: Click jump button on card popup showing a 'done' context
example_cases.expected_output: open_pr_url Tauri command called with the context's project_dir.
example_cases.setup: Show card for a done context.

example_cases.description: Settings view: LLM mode toggle switches between local/hybrid/cloud
example_cases.input: Open SettingsView, toggle LLM mode from 'local' to 'hybrid'
example_cases.expected_output: set_config Tauri command called with key='llm_mode', value='hybrid'. UI reflects new mode. Cloud API key field becomes visible.
example_cases.setup: Render SettingsView. Mock get_config returning current mode='local'.

example_cases.description: Settings view displays Ollama health status from get_llm_status
example_cases.input: Open SettingsView when Ollama is not running
example_cases.expected_output: get_llm_status called. UI shows Ollama status as 'unavailable' with setup guide link.
example_cases.setup: Mock get_llm_status returning ollama_ok=false.

example_cases.description: Intent graph uses Noto Serif editorial typography (style isolation)
example_cases.input: Render IntentGraphView
example_cases.expected_output: Intent text uses 'Noto Serif' font-family. Style does not leak into card popup (pixel-art) or settings (Space Grotesk).
example_cases.setup: Render IntentGraphView. Inspect computed font-family on intent text elements.

example_cases.description: Only submit_manual_intent, correct_intent, and config setters accept freeform user text (INV-007)
example_cases.input: Audit all Tauri command invocations in panels module
example_cases.expected_output: Only submit_manual_intent, correct_intent, and set_config commands receive user-typed text as parameters. All other commands (get_contexts, get_intent_timeline, focus_terminal, etc.) use only system-generated IDs or enum values.
example_cases.setup: Static analysis / code review of all invoke() calls in panels React code.

example_cases.description: Card popup handles get_context_detail NotFound error gracefully
example_cases.input: Emit stash://show-card for a context_id that get_context_detail returns NotFound
example_cases.expected_output: Card either doesn't appear or shows an error state (e.g., 'Context not found'). No unhandled exception.
example_cases.setup: Mock get_context_detail to reject with NotFound.

example_cases.description: Manual input submit handles submit_manual_intent failure gracefully
example_cases.input: Submit manual intent text when submit_manual_intent returns NoActiveContext error
example_cases.expected_output: Error message displayed in dialog (e.g., 'No active context'). Dialog remains open. Input text preserved.
example_cases.setup: Show ManualInputView. Mock submit_manual_intent to reject with NoActiveContext.

example_cases.description: Intent graph handles empty timeline (no intents) without crash
example_cases.input: Open IntentGraphView for a context that has zero intents
example_cases.expected_output: Graph renders empty state placeholder (e.g., 'No intents yet'). No JS error thrown.
example_cases.setup: Mock get_intent_timeline returning empty array with has_more=false.
